expectations.text: Uses the three named categories (AT RISK/BLOCKED, STALE, OVERDUE)
expectations.evidence: Uses informal headers ('Open items in Rollover/Risks', 'Overdue milestones', 'Other overdue') with no relation to the skill's three-category format.

expectations.text: STALE items identified as 7+ days no update
expectations.evidence: No stale-specific category or day-count threshold applied anywhere.
Long narrative prose with a 'Bottom line' essay section, not a highlights format.

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline found real, useful risk signal (e.g. the Pineapple Punch pilot milestone chain) but with no structural format and no stale-flagging logic — exactly the gap the skill's Job 1/Job 8 formatting exists to close.
